title: Peppery Argentinian Soybean Wrap
description: This dairy-free and soybean-centric wrap offers a peppery twist with its argentinean flair, perfect for brunch or light meals.
instructions: Chop the soya beans into small pieces.
Prepare the red onion and jalapeno peppers, remove seeds for less heat if desired. Finely chop them.
Blend the chopped soya beans with a quarter cup of soy sauce until smooth. Season with salt to taste.
Mix in half a tablespoon of olive oil to enhance flavor and texture.
Toast the lettuce leaves lightly on a baking sheet at 180°C for about 5 minutes or until crisp but not burnt.
Slice the avocado into rounds, reserve some slices whole for garnish.
Wrap each lettuce leaf with a generous spoonful of the soya sauce mixture, add some red onion and jalapeno peppers, then top with sliced avocado. Garnish with chopped cilantro leaves.
